ontology_relation_candidates.label: was produced by
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Connects a produced item to its producer.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation is semantically stable, reusable across documents, and aligns with production contexts across multiple domains (music, software, political documents). It does not duplicate existing ontology properties and is meaningful beyond isolated mentions.

ontology_relation_candidates.label: recordedBy
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates a musical recording to the record label that produced or released it.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation "recorded by" is a stable, reusable semantic link that appears across many documents involving music recordings and record labels. It aligns with existing ontology concepts (e.g., Wikidata property P272) and does not duplicate any other relation in the seed ontology.
